headline: Skin & Hair Clinic in Chennai
subheadline: Evidence-based dermatology and hair care -- no unnecessary procedures, just what's clinically right for you.
metaDescription: Skin and hair clinic in Chennai. AIIMS-trained dermatologists for hair transplant, acne, pigmentation, and cosmetic dermatology. Book a consultation.

whyPatientsChoose.title: Evidence-Based, Not Sales-Driven
whyPatientsChoose.description: Recommendations are made because they're clinically right for you, never to fill a schedule or upsell a package.

whyPatientsChoose.title: Convenient KK Nagar Location
whyPatientsChoose.description: Easy to reach from across Chennai, with flexible evening and weekend hours.

doctorsPerspectiveStructured.patientConcern: I've been to clinics before that seemed more interested in selling packages than treating me.
doctorsPerspectiveStructured.response: That's exactly the approach we push back against. Every recommendation we make is because it's clinically appropriate for your specific situation, and we're just as comfortable telling you a treatment isn't necessary as we are recommending one.

processSteps.title: Book a Consultation
processSteps.description: Call or book online at a time that works for you, including evenings and Sundays.

processSteps.title: Thorough Evaluation
processSteps.description: A real evaluation of your concern, not a rushed visit aimed at a quick upsell.

processSteps.title: Honest Treatment Plan
processSteps.description: A plan built around what you actually need, explained clearly.

landingFaqs.question: What are your clinic hours?
landingFaqs.answer: Monday to Saturday, 4:00-9:00 PM, and Sunday 9:00 AM-1:00 PM and 4:00-9:00 PM.

landingFaqs.question: Do I need a referral to book?
landingFaqs.answer: No, you can book directly for any of our services -- hair, skin, or cosmetic dermatology.

landingFaqs.question: Is parking or accessibility an issue at your location?
landingFaqs.answer: Our KK Nagar location is easily accessible from across Chennai, including Ashok Nagar, Vadapalani, Virugambakkam, and Ramapuram.
